title: Which version of DirectX is on your PC?
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: In the Search box on the toolbar, enter dxdiag . Then select dxdiag from the list of results.
In the DirectX Diagnostic Tool , select the System tab, then check the DirectX version under System Information .
